name: MoodMusic
description: Admins build per-mood Spotify song libraries. Users request a random track for any mood and receive a rich Discord embed showing album art, track title, artist, and a direct Spotify link.
install_msg:
Thanks for installing MoodMusic!

To enable rich embeds (album art, track info), set your Spotify API credentials:
`[p]moodmusic setcreds <client_id> <client_secret>`

Get credentials at: https://developer.spotify.com/dashboard
author: Bio
